mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO resume_projects (resume_id, project_name, role, start_date, end_date, is_ongoing, description, responsibilities, achievements, tech_stack, project_scale, performance_metrics, display_order, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.resumeId}, #{item.projectName}, #{item.role}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.isOngoing}, #{item.description}, #{item.responsibilities}, #{item.achievements}, #{item.techStack}, #{item.projectScale}, #{item.performanceMetrics}, #{item.displayOrder}, NOW())
